# PredictPro

> AI-powered sports predictions platform delivering daily football tips, match analysis, confidence scores, and expert reasoning — with a focus on Kenya and global leagues.

PredictPro uses machine learning to generate predictions for the Premier League, La Liga, Champions League and more, with a stated 85%+ accuracy target. Content is available in English and Swahili.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Today's AI predictions, live matches, and featured news.
- [Today's Matches](/today): Full slate of matches scheduled for today with AI predictions.
- [News](/news): Latest football news, transfer rumors, and match previews.
- [Insights](/insights): Expert analysis, betting strategies, and AI technology deep dives.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top-performing users and referral rankings.
- [Performance](/performance): Historical accuracy stats and prediction tracking.
- [About](/about): Mission, methodology, and team behind PredictPro.

## Optional

- [Responsible Gaming](/responsible-gaming): 18+ warnings and responsible betting resources.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle user data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Platform usage terms.
